description_long: This jewelry store is part of a city block, featuring two adjacent commercial buildings with a sidewalk and a street in front. The jewelry store itself has a light-colored, rectangular facade with a flat roof and a small awning above the entrance. The neighboring building has ornate stonework and decorative cornices, suggesting a more classical architectural influence. The street includes a bus stop shelter with a transparent roof and side panels, as well as several classic-style street lamps lining the sidewalk. The overall scene is clean and orderly, with clear demarcation between the road, sidewalk, and building entrances. The materials used are primarily stone, concrete, glass, and metal, giving the area a sturdy and urban feel.
description: A light-colored, rectangular jewelry store with a flat roof, awning, and adjacent ornate building, set along a city street with a bus stop and street lamps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jewelry store entrance, awning, adjacent ornate building, sidewalk, street, bus stop, and street lamps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the buildings, the bus stop shelter, and the alignment of street lamps along the sidewalk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of both buildings, rooftop details, and the absence of windows or decorative features.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite end of the street, showing the storefronts, sidewalk, and the bus stop at the far end.
attribute_lighting_fixtures: Classic-style street lamps with black metal posts and glass enclosures, positioned along the sidewalk.
